facebook.caption: Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG sits right on Bãi Dài, one of the island's longest and least-crowded stretches of sand, and it earns every bit of its 4.8-star rating from over 3,500 guests. Expect sleek, well-appointed rooms, two on-site restaurants, a gorgeous outdoor pool, and a full spa to unwind after a day of exploring. Practical tip: book a sea-view room early, as they fill up fast during peak season (November to April). This is resort life done right.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun sink behind the palms at Bãi Dài while guests drift between the pool and the shoreline. Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG delivers that effortless blend of polished comfort and barefoot beach ease. Two restaurants, a spa, and 3,500+ happy reviews speak for themselves.

instagram.caption: Beachfront bliss at Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG on Bãi Dài. Sleek rooms, an outdoor pool, two restaurants, and a spa. Rated 4.8 from 3,500+ guests. Book a sea-view room early, you will not regret it.
instagram.video_caption: Pool, beach, spa, repeat. Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG on Bãi Dài is giving full resort mode and we are here for it. 4.8 stars. Over 3,500 reviews. Enough said.

tiktok.caption: Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay on Bãi Dài is a whole vibe. Pool, beach, spa, two restaurants. 4.8 stars. This is your sign to book. #PhuQuoc #BaiDai #BeachResort #VietnamTravel #LuxuryHotel
